text: The following content is provided under a Creative Commons license. Your support will help MIT OpenCourseWare continue to offer high quality educational resources for free. To make a donation or view additional materials from hundreds of MIT courses, visit MIT OpenCourseWare at ocw.mit.edu. So I have this variable name once, which is UMBR. Looks like people are getting it. We have a variable called repeat, which is ELLA. And I'm creating a variable U, which is the concatenation of that with the repeat multiplied by 4. So I think people are on the right track seeing by the 90% here. It's going to give me this result right here. Great.
